definitions.text: A messenger, especially one bringing important news.
examples: The herald blew his trumpet and shouted that the King was dead.

definitions.text: A harbinger, giving signs of things to come.
An official whose speciality is heraldry, especially one between the ranks of pursuivant and king-of-arms
examples: Rouge Dragon is a herald at the College of Arms.

definitions.text: To proclaim or announce an event.
To greet something with excitement; to hail.
examples: The film was heralded by critics.
